item.title: Real-Time Multi-Target Sound Attenuation for Noise Sensitivity
item.description: Co-deveoloped a system to suppress multiple target sounds of interest from real world data in a real-time system.

item.title: aTENNuate based masked channel signal reconstruction in simulated environments
item.description: Developed an SSM architecture to predict masked channel audio signal at a desired location in a simulated room given source and microphone configuration. This model learns the spatial audio representation via self-supervised learning technique

item.title: aTENNuate
item.description: Developed a Deep SSM for real-time audio denoising for edge AI applications.

item.title: Odessa a speaker dependent ASR using HMM
item.description: This is a basic HMM-based ASR that uses MFCC and delta features to identify six phrases: “Odessa” (a keyword phrase), “Play music,” “Start music,” “Turn off the lights,” “Turn on the lights,” and “What time is it.”
